title: Soulection All Day 2022
content:
**🎊🌟 Happy New Year 2022 🌟🎊**

A day of exclusive mixes from [Joe Kay](/episodes/all-day-2022/#joe-kays-set), [Kirou Kirou](/episodes/all-day-2022/#kirou-kirous-set), [Mojvki](/episodes/all-day-2022/#mojvkis-set), and [Yukibeb](/episodes/all-day-2022/#yukibebs-set)



<!--more-->


#### Jump to:

- [Joe Kay](/episodes/all-day-2022/#joe-kays-set) - Los Angeles 🇺🇸
- [Kirou Kirou](/episodes/all-day-2022/#kirou-kirous-set) - Paris 🇫🇷
- [Mojvki](/episodes/all-day-2022/#mojvkis-set) - Johannesburg & Cape Town 🇿🇦
- [Yukibeb](/episodes/all-day-2022/#yukibebs-set) - Tokyo 🇯🇵


Also listen to [Soulection All Day 2021](/episodes/all-day-2021/), [Soulection All Day 2020](/episodes/all-day-2020/), or [Soulection All Day 2019](/episodes/all-day-2019/).

chapters.title: Joe Kay's Set
chapters.content:
Listen to this mix on [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/gb/station/soulection-all-day-joe-kay/ra.1600575016?at=1010lMz4) or [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/joekay/soulection-all-day-2022-joe-kay?in=soulection/sets/soulection-all-day-2022)

Joe Kay delivers an exclusive mix to bring in 2022 from Los Angeles 🇺🇸.

Discover Joe Kay: [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/joekay/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/joekay), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/joekay/), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/user/joekayxsoulection), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/joekaytravels), and [SongKick](https://www.songkick.com/artists/594314-joe-kay)
